Sannel.Encoding.Manager
Table of Contents

Interface IScanCacheProvider

Namespace
Sannel.Encoding.Manager.HandBrake
Assembly
Sannel.Encoding.Manager.HandBrake.dll

Abstraction over disc scan result caching, allowing different implementations (EF Core, in-memory, no-op, etc.).

public interface IScanCacheProvider

Methods

GetCachedScanJsonAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Retrieves the cached scan JSON for inputPath if it was cached within the last 24 hours. Returns null otherwise.

Task<string?> GetCachedScanJsonAsync(string inputPath, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

inputPath string
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task<string>

SaveScanAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)

Stores the raw scan JSON for inputPath in the cache, replacing any previous entry.

Task SaveScanAsync(string inputPath, string scanJson, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

inputPath string
scanJson string
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task
